englishDefinitions: Ruined or made your evening less enjoyable.
Caused a pleasant evening to become unpleasant or disappointing.
persianTranslation: باعث شد شب خوبی نداشته باشی
examples: I'm sorry the argument spoiled your evening.
The bad news spoiled your evening, didn't it?
A sudden rainstorm spoiled your evening at the outdoor concert.
